data.title: SEC weighs proposal to change BlackRock’s spot Bitcoin ETF to allow in-kind redemptions
data.description:
The U.S. SEC is weighing a proposal to change BlackRock's spot bitcoin exchange-traded fund to allow in-kind redemptions.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/339323/sec-weighs-proposal-to-change-blackrocks-spot-bitcoin-etf-to-allow-in-kind-redemptions?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Market Update: Crypto Prices Recover, but Growth Stays Murky
data.description:
Global crypto prices are showing signs of recovery, yet uncertainty continues to shadow the market. Following new tariffs announced on Feb 3 by President Donald Trump on imports from China, Canada, and Mexico, cryptocurrencies experienced heightened volatility earlier this week. Despite a rebound in key assets, growth prospects remain murky as investors weigh geopolitical risks […]
The post...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/06/market-update-crypto-prices-recover-but-growth-stays-murky/

data.title: Crypto News: Is Kraken Sitting on the Key to Satoshi Nakamoto’s True Identity
data.description:
The mystery of Bitcoin’s creator, Satoshi Nakamoto, has resurfaced in crypto news as Coinbase director Conor Grogan speculated that Kraken and its founder, Jesse Powell, might have access to Satoshi’s real identity . The claim follows new blockchain data revealing a link between an old Satoshi-linked wallet and a centralized exchange. On Feb 4, blockchain […]
The post Crypto News: Is Kraken...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/06/crypto-news-is-kraken-sitting-on-the-key-to-satoshi-nakamotos-true-identity/

data.title: SEC makes its move and asks public for comments on Grayscale’s Litecoin ETF
data.description:
The U.S. SEC asked the public to comment on a proposal for converting Grayscale's Litecoin trust into an exchange-traded product.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/339313/sec-makes-its-move-and-asks-public-for-comments-on-grayscales-litecoin-etf?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bitcoin treasury adoption grows in LATAM, mirroring US strategic BTC reserve plan
data.description:
Large corporations in Argentina and Brazil are embracing Bitcoin by establishing BTC-based treasuries. Cointelegraph explains why.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-treasury-adoption-in-latam-mirroring-us-strategic-btc-reserve?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Arthur Hayes Warns Against U.S. Bitcoin Reserve, Citing Political Risks
data.description:
A prominent crypto industry figure has raised concerns about the idea of a U.S. Bitcoin reserve, arguing that it could be more detrimental than beneficial.
The post Arthur Hayes Warns Against U.S. Bitcoin Reserve, Citing Political Risks appeared first on Cryptodnes.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/arthur-hayes-warns-against-u-s-bitcoin-reserve-citing-political-risks/
